headline: Elon Musk Chimes In As Delta Picks Amazon Leo Over Starlink: They Wanted To Make It 'Painful, Difficult And Expensive'
summary: Elon Musk says Delta Air Lines wanted a branded login portal for Starlink internet, while SpaceX insisted on a seamless connection.
